title: taraxacum lenense
intro: Taraxacum lenense, also known as the Mongolian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum lenense include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
